name: F570 Jökulhálsleið — NOT on route
note: Tempting Snæfellsnes shortcut over/near Snæfellsjökull. This plan uses 574 around the coast instead.

name: Road 939 Öxi — avoided
note: This plan follows Route 1 through the Eastfjords rather than taking the steep/gravel Öxi shortcut.

name: 864 Dettifoss east side — avoided
note: This plan uses Road 862 to the west-side Dettifoss car park. Check current status before using 864.

name: F206 Lakagígar/Laki — NOT on route
note: Stop at Fjaðrárgljúfur. Continuing inland toward Lakagígar/Laki becomes F206 highland driving.

name: F249 Þórsmörk — NOT on route
note: Seljalandsfoss is on the plan; continuing into Þórsmörk/F249 involves serious river crossings.

name: Highland continuation of Road 35/Kjölur — NOT on route
note: The route uses Road 35 only for the Golden Circle section near Geysir/Gullfoss.
